name: Cheese Grits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook grits in salted water until thick.
2. Beat egg yolks. Slowly beat in butter.
3. Stir in cheeses, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne.
4. Stir the mixture into the grits.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff.
6. Gently fold egg whites into the grits mixture.
7. Transfer to a buttered casserole dish.
8. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
